hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '^src/.*\.zig$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: Security-related .zig changes require tests first (TDD). Did you write the test before the implementation?"}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
